title: Part 3 – Conversation : préparer l'arrivée d'un nouvel employé
instructions: Écoutez la conversation, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Man: Have you finished preparing the onboarding schedule for our new sales assistant, Mr. Park? Woman: Almost. He starts on Monday, so I've planned his first morning around IT setup and a welcome meeting with the team. Man: Good. Don't forget he'll also need access to the shared drive and the customer database. Woman: Right, I already sent a request to IT this morning. They said it usually takes about a day to set up. Man: Perfect. Could you also ask him to bring two forms of ID for the contract signing on his first day? Woman: Sure, I'll include that in the welcome email I'm sending him this afternoon.

questions.prompt: What is the conversation mainly about?
choices: Planning a new employee's first day
questions.explanation: Les deux collègues organisent l'arrivée et la première journée d'un nouvel assistant commercial.

questions.prompt: What is the woman waiting for from the IT department?
choices: Access to the shared drive and customer database
questions.explanation: Elle dit avoir envoyé une demande à IT pour l'accès au lecteur partagé et à la base de données clients.

questions.prompt: What does the man ask the woman to remind the new employee about?
questions.explanation: Il demande : "Could you also ask him to bring two forms of ID for the contract signing on his first day?".
